repos.headline: The CLAUDE.md that changed everything
repos.description: A single CLAUDE.md file designed to fundamentally improve Claude Code behavior — inspired by Karpathy's engineering philosophy.
repos.security: 🟢 Safe — Markdown only, zero runtime, zero deps
repos.whyItMatters: A single file that measurably improves how any Claude Code instance reasons and acts. Read it, steal the patterns that work for your setup. The ROI is immediate.

repos.headline: The agent that grows with you
repos.description: Hermes Agent is a full-stack AI agent framework built for long-horizon tasks, continuous learning, and deep tool integration.
repos.security: 🟡 Vigilance — heavy deps, cloud API calls, review before prod
repos.whyItMatters: The hierarchical memory architecture (working / episodic / semantic) is the real lesson here. Even if you don't use Hermes directly, the pattern is worth understanding and replicating in your own agent systems.

repos.headline: Turn coding agents into real teammates
repos.description: The open-source managed agents platform — orchestrate specialized AI agents with shared state, roles, and persistent context across tasks.
repos.security: 🟡 Vigilance — cloud-managed, review data retention policy
repos.whyItMatters: Managed agent orchestration without the plumbing. The shared-state model between agents is genuinely novel — most open-source alternatives are stateless. Worth benchmarking against custom setups.

repos.headline: Make AI coding deterministic
repos.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Define repeatable, testable workflows that produce consistent output every time.
repos.security: 🟢 Safe — local execution, no telemetry found
repos.whyItMatters: The core insight: AI coding is non-deterministic by default, but your CI/CD pipeline cannot be. Archon's harness model is the missing layer between 'Claude wrote some code' and 'this ships to prod'.

repos.headline: Every file format, one Markdown output
repos.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown — PDF, DOCX, XLSX, images, audio transcription, and more.
repos.security: 🟢 Safe — MIT, Microsoft maintained, no external calls by default
repos.whyItMatters: The missing pre-processing step for any RAG pipeline or document-driven agent. Converts messy real-world files into clean Markdown that LLMs can actually reason about. 109k stars don't lie.

repos.headline: Production-grade skills for coding agents
repos.description: A curated collection of production-grade engineering skills built specifically for AI coding agents — performance, testing, architecture.
repos.security: 🟢 Safe — Shell/Markdown only, read-only skills, no network calls
repos.whyItMatters: Addy Osmani (Google Chrome) curating Claude Code skills is a strong signal. These aren't toy examples — they're production patterns from engineers shipping at scale. Direct drop-in value.

repos.headline: Claude remembers everything, always
repos.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures every action, decision, and artifact during sessions — zero manual intervention required.
repos.security: 🟢 Safe — local SQLite storage, no external calls, MIT
repos.whyItMatters: Persistent memory is the single biggest gap in Claude Code workflows. This plugin closes it without any manual effort. The auto-capture model means you never lose context between sessions — set it and forget it.

repos.headline: Twelve AI analysts, one hedge fund
repos.description: An AI Hedge Fund Team — specialized agents for value investing, sentiment analysis, risk management, and portfolio optimization.
repos.security: 🟡 Vigilance — hits financial APIs, review data permissions
repos.whyItMatters: The real value isn't finance — it's the multi-specialist agent pattern. Each agent has a narrow job, strict tool access, and passes structured output downstream. A clean reference architecture for any domain.
